daily.today_energy: Mercury's doing its thing and you're basically operating at full capacity. Your vibe is *chef's kiss* — curious, witty, and everyone wants to be in your orbit. Lean into the spontaneous energy.
daily.love: Someone's been noticing your energy from across the room. Whether you're single or coupled up, today's about showing up authentically. No games, just genuine connection. Your realness is the hottest thing about you rn.
daily.career: Your ideas are hitting different today. If you've been sitting on a pitch or proposal, this is your moment to speak up. The universe is backing your boldness — trust the timing and your instincts.
daily.health: Your body's asking for movement and fresh air. Could be a walk, a gym sesh, or just dancing in your room. Your nervous system thrives on variety, so switch things up and feel the difference.

weekly.overview: Mercury's dancing through your sector of self-expression this week, Gemini. You're vibing on a frequency where your words hit different—use that gift wisely. Expect unexpected conversations that shift perspective.
weekly.love: Your heart's ready to be vulnerable in ways that surprise you. If you're coupled up, deeper talks are calling. Single? Someone's about to notice the energy you've been radiating. Let things unfold naturally.
weekly.career: Your ideas are gold right now, but the real magic happens when you actually share them. Collaboration beats solo efforts this week. Trust that stepping into visibility opens doors you didn't know existed.
weekly.health: Your nervous system's asking for gentleness. Try moving your body in ways that feel good rather than punishing. Rest isn't lazy—it's the vibe check your energy desperately needs to recalibrate.
